name: Lachlan
oneLine: Australian gaming YouTuber and PWR esports founder known for Fortnite, Pixelmon and Pokemon GO content.
bio: Lachlan Power, born 1995 in Brisbane, registered the CraftBattleDuty channel in 2013 and built early audiences with Minecraft, Pixelmon and How to Minecraft series before riding the Pokemon GO boom in 2016-17 and pivoting fully to Fortnite. In June 2020 he founded PWR, a Queensland-based Fortnite esports org and apparel brand, and in October 2020 received his own Fortnite Icon Series outfit. He won the 2020 Fortnite Summer Smash Pro-Am with Fresh and Enschway.
style: challenge runs and competitive gameplay commentary
